\clearpage
\section{Counterfactuals}
\label{sec:app-counterfactuals}

This appendix reports the observed and counterfactual energy-price component indices used to assess price-measure effects. Figures are ordered alphabetically by country. The synthetic neighbourhood benchmark is excluded.

\subsection{Belgium}
\begin{center}
\centering
\begin{minipage}{0.92\textwidth}
\centering
{\large\textbf{Belgium -- electricity (CP0451), VAT reduction}\par}
\vspace{0.2em}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.265\textheight,keepaspectratio]{fig/counterfactuals/01_belgium_cp0451_vat_exclusive_rechained.png}
{\scriptsize\RaggedRight Source: Eurostat HICP; Bruegel energy-policy dataset; authors' calculations.\\
Note: The counterfactual removes the temporary VAT cut by backing out the reduced-tax price, reapplying the normal VAT rate and rechaining the index.\par}
\end{minipage}
\vspace{0.6em}
\begin{minipage}{0.92\textwidth}
\centering
{\large\textbf{Belgium -- gas (CP0452), VAT reduction}\par}
\vspace{0.2em}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.265\textheight,keepaspectratio]{fig/counterfactuals/02_belgium_cp0452_vat_exclusive_rechained.png}
{\scriptsize\RaggedRight Source: Eurostat HICP; Bruegel energy-policy dataset; authors' calculations.\\
Note: The counterfactual removes the temporary VAT cut by backing out the reduced-tax price, reapplying the normal VAT rate and rechaining the index.\par}
\end{minipage}
\end{center}
\clearpage

\subsection{Greece}
\begin{center}
\centering
\begin{minipage}{0.92\textwidth}
\centering
{\large\textbf{Greece -- electricity (CP0451), unit subsidy}\par}
\vspace{0.2em}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.265\textheight,keepaspectratio]{fig/counterfactuals/08_greece_cp0451_unit_subsidy_rechained.png}
{\scriptsize\RaggedRight Source: Eurostat HICP; Bruegel energy-policy dataset and statutory unit-subsidy schedules; authors' calculations.\\

\end{minipage}

\subsection{Italy}
\begin{center}
\centering
\begin{minipage}{0.92\textwidth}
\centering
{\large\textbf{Italy -- electricity (CP0451), social bonus aggregate test}\par}
\vspace{0.2em}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.265\textheight,keepaspectratio]{fig/counterfactuals/18_italy_cp0451_targeted_social_bonus_aggregate_test.png}
{\scriptsize\RaggedRight Source: Eurostat HICP; Bruegel energy-policy dataset; ARERA social-bonus information; authors' calculations.\\
Note: This is an aggregate incidence test for a targeted bill discount; it is shown as an order-of-magnitude exercise rather than a final HICP correction.\par}
\end{minipage}
\vspace{0.6em}
\begin{minipage}{0.92\textwidth}
\centering
{\large\textbf{Italy -- gas (CP0452), social bonus aggregate test}\par}
\vspace{0.2em}
